evals.prompt:
Review this Backpack icon-only button for accessibility issues:

```html
<button class="BpkButton BpkButton--secondary">
  <svg aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2l10 20H2z"/></svg>
</button>
```
evals.expected_output: High finding: button has no accessible name.
expectations: Flags missing accessible name as High impact
References WCAG 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value
Recommends alt text or a visually-hidden class
Does not recommend title attribute
Identifies affected groups as Screen reader users and Speech input users

evals.prompt: Review this BpkCheckbox used in a car hire filter: ```html
evals.expected_output: High finding: aria-labelledby resolves to 'Hertz' only, omitting 'from £21'. The price is commercially significant context. Removing aria-labelledby and relying on native label association would produce a better computed name.
expectations: Flags incomplete accessible name as High impact
References WCAG 1.3.1 and 2.5.3
Identifies that aria-labelledby overrides the native label
Recommends removing aria-labelledby OR extending it to include both IDs
Notes that the native label association would produce a better result

evals.prompt:
Review this Backpack calendar date cell:

```html
<button
  class="BpkCalendarDate"
  aria-pressed="true"
  tabindex="0"
>15</button>
evals.expected_output: High finding: date cells must use aria-selected, not aria-pressed. aria-pressed is for toggle buttons. For calendar date selection, aria-selected is the correct attribute.
expectations: Flags aria-pressed as incorrect on a date cell
Recommends aria-selected instead
Distinguishes toggle button (aria-pressed) from selection (aria-selected)
References WCAG 4.1.2

evals.prompt:
Review this Backpack info banner: ```html
Your flight is delayed by 2 hours.
evals.expected_output: High finding: banner type (warning) is conveyed only by the icon and colour. Screen reader users will not know this is a warning. The SVG should be aria-hidden and a visually hidden text node should communicate the type.
expectations: Flags missing banner type announcement as High
Notes SVG is not aria-hidden
Recommends visually hidden text for the banner type
References WCAG 1.3.1 and 1.4.1
Provides a code example showing the correct pattern

evals.prompt:
Review this search form (not a Backpack component):

```html
<form>
  <input type="text" placeholder="Search flights" />
  <button type="submit">Search</button>
</form>
evals.expected_output: Blocker finding: input has no programmatically associated label. Placeholder text is not a label substitute. Must add a visible label or visually hidden label associated via for/id.
expectations: Flags missing label as Blocker
References WCAG 1.3.1 and 3.3.2
Does not accept placeholder as a label substitute
Recommends adding a <label> element
Notes that this is a general web finding, not Backpack-specific
